steps.title: Spot the key definition
steps.content: The dash and following elaboration—”variations in size, shape, and material”—defines what the blank word must mean.

steps.title: Match the word to the definition
steps.content: Inconsistencies means lack of consistency—exactly what variations in size, shape, and material represent. Restraints, incompatibilities, and disruptions describe restrictions, conflicts, or disturbances—not variations. That matches choice B — B is correct.
